titleStmt.title: SII 23.108: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 108. (A.R. No. 108 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri-Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the south wall of the central shrine

summary.p: This is another record with the same regnal year of the king, registering a similar gift of one achchu for the expenses of a festival in the temple on the day of amāvāsyā in the month of Paṅguṉi, by a lady by name Āṇḍanaṅgai, the wife of Talaichcheṅgāṭṭu Śrī kṛishṇaṉ a resident of Śrīvaikundam alias Rājēndraśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tiruvaḻudi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭu mu
ṭikoṇṭacoḻapurattu viraapiṣekam paṇṇiaruḷiya śrīcun=tarapāṇṭiya
devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10- vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeya
m śrīḷarājarājacaturvedimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟucci nālāyira
viṇṇakaremperumāṉukku tiruvaḻutināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī vaikunta māṉa rājentira
coḻaccaturvedimaṅkalattu talaicceṅkāṭṭu śrīkṛṣṇaṉ brāhmaṇi Āṇṭa naṅkai paṅ
kūṉi Amaāvāsikku Iṭṭa Accu 1 Ivvaccu Oṉṟil poliyūṭṭu koṇṭu puṟappaṭṭaruḷi tirumañcaṉa
m ceytaruḷi tiruvārātaṉam koṇṭaruḷi Okkum Aṟu nāḻikkālāl kala Arici peruntiruppoṉa
kamum neyyamutu nāḻiyum taiyiramutum kaṟiamutum curuḷ Aympatum Ivvaccil poliyūṭṭu
koṇṭu candrādi(ti)ttavaṟ celvatāṉamaikku svasti śrī .
Digital edition of SII 23.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
